scripts.build:local: node scripts/fetch-playlist.js && set "ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1" && set "XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler\xdg.config" && set "WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler\logs" && astro build
scripts.sync:local: node scripts/fetch-playlist.js && set "ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1" && set "XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler\xdg.config" && set "WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler\logs" && astro sync
